# afo-mobile-terminal-mcp

Purpose: Command-center layer above AFO MCP tools. Orchestrates deploy, smoke test, registry, handoff, and Cloudflare inventory for mobile-first workflows.

Version: 0.1.0

Base URL: https://afo-mobile-terminal-mcp.jaredtechfit.workers.dev

Routes:
- GET /                         — Mobile terminal UI
- GET /health                   — Health check (no secrets exposed)
- GET /llms.txt                 — This file
- GET /tools/list               — JSON tool catalog
- POST /mcp                     — MCP tool surface
- GET /contracts/ui-contract.json — UI card contract

Tools (10):
- list_command_belts      — List all configured command belts and their live status
- list_registered_workers — List registered workers from registry or GitHub deployments
- open_worker_urls        — Return all live URLs for a given worker script_name
- validate_worker         — Validate Worker folder in GitHub (via afo-mobile-deploy-mcp)
- preview_worker_deploy   — Preview deploy plan without writing to Cloudflare
- deploy_worker           — Deploy Worker from GitHub to Cloudflare (confirmed:true required)
- run_smoke_test          — Run smoke tests against a live Worker
- list_recent_deploys     — List recent deployment receipts from GitHub
- register_worker         — Register/update Worker metadata (confirmed:true required)
- write_handoff           — Write a handoff note (confirmed:true required)

Integration targets:
- afo-mobile-deploy-mcp  (DEPLOY_MCP_URL env)   — deploy, validate, smoke test, receipts
- AFO registry           (REGISTRY_URL env)      — list/register workers
- handoff-mcp            (HANDOFF_MCP_URL env)   — write handoffs
- Cloudflare gateway     (CF_GATEWAY_URL env)    — inventory
- GitHub                 (GITHUB_TOKEN env)       — source-of-truth, receipts, handoffs

Security:
- All write actions are preview-first and confirmation-gated (confirmed:true)
- No secret values ever exposed in /health, UI, logs, or receipts
- CF_API_TOKEN, GITHUB_TOKEN, CF_ACCOUNT_ID are server-side only

Mobile CLI pattern:
  iPhone → MCP command surface → GitHub source-of-truth → Cloudflare runtime → smoke tests → receipts
